---
title: "Notes"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## exponential survival time

i want to plot all of these overlayed 1) each simulation run 2) the pooled simulations 3) the theoretical survival curve given as S(t) = exp(-lambda * t * exp(beta * Z)).

###stochastic process

#without gemini corrections 1000 sims
  lambda pct_cancer time_t        bias        rmse   ecr
1   0.02  0.0625290      1 0.005636691 0.009747674 0.876
2   0.02  0.0625290      2 0.011221104 0.015892534 0.836
3   0.02  0.0625290      3 0.017978089 0.023085753 0.764
4   0.05  0.1481020      1 0.005409309 0.010101463 0.894
5   0.05  0.1481020      2 0.011097462 0.016702483 0.834
6   0.05  0.1481020      3 0.016852531 0.022574396 0.808
7   0.10  0.2714155      1 0.005074633 0.010890211 0.907
8   0.10  0.2714155      2 0.009546779 0.016137730 0.889
9   0.10  0.2714155      3 0.013684307 0.021279281 0.844

100 sims
10   0.30   0.519115      1 0.0034497988 0.012148578 0.92
11   0.30   0.519115      2 0.0078043845 0.016345799 0.91
12   0.30   0.519115      3 0.0118225861 0.020483765 0.87
13   0.50   0.563370      1 0.0051602636 0.013155538 0.96
14   0.50   0.563370      2 0.0066412326 0.016150998 0.94
15   0.50   0.563370      3 0.0050652766 0.015068332 0.97
16   1.00   0.641440      1 0.0045146403 0.013341931 0.95
17   1.00   0.641440      2 0.0033063851 0.013603781 0.92
18   1.00   0.641440      3 0.0039610187 0.020443063 0.82
19   1.50   0.657795      1 0.0029506494 0.013005489 0.93
20   1.50   0.657795      2 0.0009645201 0.017922211 0.87
21   1.50   0.657795      3 0.0398091533 0.043646814 0.07

## with gemini corrections INTRA YEAR HAZARD ONLY 100 sims
   lambda pct_cancer time_t          bias        rmse  ecr
1    0.05   0.148130      1  0.0027265409 0.008624593 0.92
2    0.05   0.148130      2  0.0091295368 0.014341266 0.90
3    0.05   0.148130      3  0.0155517048 0.020961278 0.83
4    0.10   0.270945      1  0.0065896776 0.011443045 0.88
5    0.10   0.270945      2  0.0113536531 0.017609631 0.83
6    0.10   0.270945      3  0.0157293503 0.022262585 0.83
7    0.20   0.436230      1  0.0043439175 0.011908459 0.94
8    0.20   0.436230      2  0.0086688449 0.018317707 0.84
9    0.20   0.436230      3  0.0115549217 0.020634312 0.84
10   0.30   0.521165      1  0.0040765525 0.012721406 0.92
11   0.30   0.521165      2  0.0063891659 0.015716961 0.92
12   0.30   0.521165      3  0.0063160494 0.015946568 0.93
13   0.50   0.561955      1  0.0037086938 0.014164705 0.91
14   0.50   0.561955      2  0.0041023292 0.015948051 0.93
15   0.50   0.561955      3  0.0073396032 0.016637482 0.92
16   1.00   0.642965      1  0.0023486644 0.014190180 0.93
17   1.00   0.642965      2  0.0015347702 0.012003422 0.96
18   1.00   0.642965      3 -0.0007493073 0.019710220 0.84
19   1.50   0.655730      1  0.0012217744 0.011800543 0.97
20   1.50   0.655730      2  0.0057811070 0.018202950 0.88
21   1.50   0.655730      3  0.0446258102 0.047847651 0.04


## with gemini corrections INTRA YEAR HAZARD and CENTERED AGE  1000 sims
   lambda pct_cancer time_t          bias        rmse   ecr
1    0.02  0.0620065      1  0.0006609841 0.007892229 0.951
2    0.02  0.0620065      2  0.0017559986 0.012013745 0.941
3    0.02  0.0620065      3  0.0023590068 0.014961147 0.951
4    0.05  0.1463150      1  0.0012023922 0.009064984 0.951
5    0.05  0.1463150      2  0.0019257898 0.012653334 0.946
6    0.05  0.1463150      3  0.0025783718 0.015976299 0.944
7    0.10  0.2692365      1  0.0008609572 0.009928714 0.939
8    0.10  0.2692365      2  0.0011776463 0.013860598 0.944
9    0.10  0.2692365      3  0.0011028998 0.016269662 0.936
10   0.20  0.4322270      1  0.0012640828 0.011170243 0.939
11   0.20  0.4322270      2  0.0009207678 0.014810076 0.945
12   0.20  0.4322270      3  0.0012810673 0.016709981 0.942
13   0.30  0.5163670      1  0.0006271400 0.011820470 0.953
14   0.30  0.5163670      2  0.0005019081 0.014417908 0.951
15   0.30  0.5163670      3  0.0000300718 0.015595682 0.950
16   0.50  0.5603955      1  0.0004036394 0.012866152 0.956
17   0.50  0.5603955      2  0.0005255884 0.014930267 0.939
18   0.50  0.5603955      3  0.0005244183 0.015573276 0.951
19   1.00  0.6414800      1  0.0001910748 0.012810405 0.955
20   1.00  0.6414800      2 -0.0001531532 0.011894277 0.961
21   1.00  0.6414800      3  0.0009510477 0.019575102 0.848
22   1.50  0.6554255      1  0.0008426470 0.012308906 0.948
23   1.50  0.6554255      2  0.0026245222 0.017619830 0.842
24   1.50  0.6554255      3  0.0414725401 0.044983889 0.063

### pct_cancer was calculated incorrectly in the above tables

# Covariates
1. edit the functions so they can handle covariates sex and possibly X/race

# calibration engine
1. should automatically calculate the appropriate borne_a for all the lambda scenarios and given parameters. then insert them into to the lambda scenarios
2. should calculate borne_a to control for random (LTFU) censoring only (ignore administrative censoring)?

# follow up time calculation engine
1. should automatically calculate the appropriate follow up time (max_time) using nessie minimum expected survival.It should automatically insert the computed value in the simulation run.
2. time point measurements should be updated everywhere automatically. consider taking measurements every 2 years starting at year 1. Also always report measurements at max_time.

#batch refactoring
1. refactor the lambda batches so its not redundant and wont be necessary to update every lambda scenario file when something changes

#Generalized Weibull data generation
1. attempt the simulations with accelerated time failure
